name: Giant Double Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cream together the shortening and brown sugar until smooth.
3. Beat in the egg, sour cream, and vanilla extract.
4. Melt 1 1/2 cups of chocolate chips and stir into the mixture.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, stirring until well combined.
7. Fold in the chopped walnuts and remaining chocolate chips.
8. Chill the dough for 30 minutes.
9. Using an ice cream scoop or a heaping tablespoon of dough per cookie, shape the cookies on greased baking sheets.
10. Flatten each cookie slightly to about 3 inches in diameter.
11. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until set but still slightly soft in the center.
12. This recipe yields approximately 16 giant cookies.
